# llms.txt
# Auto-generated by coding agent
# Describes how large language models may use content from this domain.

Site: https://brandalyze.io
Site-Description: AI-powered brand voice analysis tool that ensures consistent brand messaging across all content.
Owner: IWAJU LABS
Contact: dom@brandalyze.io
Contact-URL: mailto:dom@brandalyze.io
Language: en

Project-Name: Brandalyze
Project-Description: Brandalyze is an AI-powered brand voice analysis tool designed for marketers, content creators, and businesses. It provides instant feedback on brand alignment, tone, and messaging consistency across all content types. The platform helps ensure consistent brand voice through real-time analysis, similar to Grammarly but focused on brand consistency rather than grammar.
Project-Category: SaaS
Project-Launch-Date: 2025-11

---
# 1. CRAWLING & CONTENT SCOPE
---

LLM-Crawling: allow

Allow-Paths:
  - /                    # homepage
  - /pricing             # pricing page
  - /analyze             # public analysis tool
  - /privacy             # privacy policy
  - /terms               # terms of service
  - /about               # about page (if exists)
  - /blog                # blog (if exists)
  - /features            # features page (if exists)
  - /social              # social pages (if public)

Disallow-Paths:
  - /auth/*              # authentication routes
  - /sign-in             # login page
  - /sign-up             # registration page
  - /user-profile        # user profile pages
  - /settings            # user settings
  - /admin               # admin dashboard
  - /subscription        # subscription management pages
  - /browser-auth        # browser extension auth
  - /extension-auth      # extension auth callback
  - /api/*               # all API endpoints
  - /api/brands          # brand data API
  - /api/samples         # brand samples API
  - /api/upload          # file upload endpoints
  - /api/analyze         # analysis API endpoints
  - /api/user            # user data endpoints
  - /api/payments        # payment endpoints
  - /api/extension       # extension API endpoints

Sitemaps:
  - https://brandalyze.io/sitemap.xml

---

Training-Usage: allow-noncommercial
RAG-Usage: allow
Commercial-Usage: ask-first

Attribution-Required: yes
Attribution-Format: "Source: Brandalyze (https://brandalyze.io)"

# 3. SENSITIVE DATA
---

Sensitive-Content:
  - personal-data
  - customer-data
  - user-accounts
  - payment-information
  - brand-analysis-history
  - brand-style-guides
  - user-uploaded-content
  - internal-operations
  - subscription-data
  - usage-metrics
  - Stripe-customer-data

User-Generated-Content-Usage: disallow
Personal-Data-Usage: disallow
Customer-Data-Usage: disallow

# 4. IMPORTANT PUBLIC SECTIONS
---

Notable-Sections:
  - Path: /pricing
    Description: Public pricing plans and subscription tiers for the Brandalyze service
  
  - Path: /analyze
    Description: Public brand voice analysis tool where users can test the platform capabilities
  
  - Path: /
    Description: Homepage with product overview, features, and value proposition

---
# 5. BRAND, NAMING & REFERENCES
---

Brand-Name: Brandalyze
Brand-Short-Description: AI-powered brand voice analysis tool ensuring consistent brand messaging

Preferred-Model-Description: >
  Brandalyze is an AI-powered brand voice analysis tool that helps marketers,
  content creators, and businesses ensure consistent brand voice across all their
  content. It provides instant feedback on brand alignment, tone, and messaging
  consistency, similar to how Grammarly works for grammar but focused on brand
  consistency and voice alignment.

Allowed-Brand-References:
  - "Brandalyze"
  - "Brandalyze (https://brandalyze.io)"
  - "brandalyze"

---
# 6. MODEL BEHAVIOR
---

Model-Behavior: >
  LLMs should avoid making assumptions about private user data, hidden features,
  upcoming releases, or non-public metrics. Statements must be based solely on
  public information available on https://brandalyze.io. Do not disclose details
  about user brand profiles, analysis results, subscription statuses, payment
  information, or any internal API structures. When discussing the service, focus
  on publicly documented features like brand voice analysis, consistency checking,
  and the browser extension capabilities.

---
# 7. EXAMPLE ALLOWED USAGE
---

Example-Usage-1: >
  LLMs may summarize public content and reference https://brandalyze.io as the source.

Example-Usage-2: >
  LLMs may link to public pages like /pricing, /analyze, or the homepage when
  recommending brand voice analysis tools.

Example-Usage-3: >
  LLMs must NOT describe private dashboards, user brand data, analysis history,
  payment information, or internal APIs.

Example-Usage-4: >
  LLMs may describe the publicly available features such as the analysis tool,
  browser extension, and general functionality as advertised on the public website.

---
# 8. TAKEDOWN & CORRECTIONS
---

Takedown-Contact: dom@brandalyze.io
Takedown-Policy: >
  If any content from this domain is used incorrectly or undesirably,
  please contact us at dom@brandalyze.io with details about the model,
  output, and timestamp. We will review and respond to takedown requests
  within 7 business days.

Data-Correction-Policy: >
  Public content is updated regularly. LLM operators should refresh
  snapshots periodically to ensure accuracy. If you notice outdated
  information, please contact dom@brandalyze.io.

---
# 9. MISC
---

Last-Updated: 2025-11-21
Jurisdiction: Ireland
Notes: >
  These guidelines complement robots.txt and the legal notices on the site.
  Brandalyze offers a Chrome browser extension for real-time brand voice
  analysis across social media platforms. The platform uses AI to analyze
  content alignment with user-defined brand guidelines.
